hooks.command: branch=$(git branch --show-current); up=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref --symbolic-full-name @{u} 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$up" ]; then echo "BACKUP WARNING: branch '$branch' has no upstream — nothing is backed up to origin. Run: git push -u origin HEAD" >&2; exit 2; fi; n=$(git rev-list --count @{u}..HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo '?'); if [ "$n" != "0" ]; then echo "BACKUP WARNING: $n commit(s) on '$branch' are NOT on $up — the auto-push did not reach origin. Run: git push" >&2; exit 2; fi
